questions.question: Which Technology company is the service provider for Passport Seva Programme 2.0?
questions.explanation: The Ministry of External Affairs (MEA) has selected Tata Consultancy Services for the second phase of the Passport Seva Programme. TCS had successfully implemented its first phase, which was introduced in 2008. The programme aimed to improve delivery of passport-related services, digitise processes, fast-track the timelines, and improve transparency.

questions.question: Wolf Volcano, which was seen in the news, is the highest peak in which island group?
questions.explanation: Wolf Volcano, also known as Mount Whiton, is the highest peak in the Galápagos Islands. It is a volcanic archipelago in the Pacific Ocean. The volcanic mountain recently erupted, spewing lava and clouds of ash over the Pacific Ocean. The cloud of gas and ash from Wolf Volcano rose to 3,793 meters above sea level after the eruption. The islands are part of the province of Ecuador.

questions.question: Which Indian has been appointed as the New Vice President of Asian Infrastructure Investment Fund (AIIB)?
questions.explanation: Former Reserve Bank of India (RBI) Governor Urjit Patel has been appointed Vice-President of the Asian Infrastructure Investment Bank (AIIB). He will serve a three-year term as one of the five Vice-Presidents Beijing-based multilateral bank. HE replaces the former Gujarat Chief Secretary D.J. Pandian, who had been the Vice-President, leading the investment operations and lending in South and Southeast Asia.

questions.question: Which country has officially banned ‘Conversion therapy’ which claims to change a person’s sexual orientation or gender identity?
questions.explanation: Canada has officially banned conversion therapy, joining a select list of countries that discontinued the treatment that claims to be able to change a person’s sexual orientation or gender identity. The ban was passed by the Parliament in December 2021. Apart from Canada, there is only a small list of countries that have banned conversion therapies, which includes Brazil, Ecuador, Germany and Malta. Under the law, anyone who looks to subject someone to conversion therapy could face up to five years in prison.

questions.question: Pierre-Olivier Gourinchas is the new Chief Economist of which institution?
questions.explanation: The International Monetary Fund (IMF) has appointed Pierre-Olivier Gourinchas as the next chief economist, replacing Indian origin Gita Gopinath. Kristalina Georgieva, Managing Director of the International Monetary Fund (IMF) announced the appointment of the French-born University of California-Berkeley economist. Gita Gopinath has been appointed the first deputy managing director of the IMF.

questions.question: Alikhan Smailov is the new Prime Minister of which country?
questions.explanation: Kassym-Jomart Tokayev, the President of Kazakhstan has nominated Alikhan Smailov as the Prime Minister. The President had sacked the government to ease dissent. Tokayev had requested from the Collective Security Treaty Organization (CSTO), a military alliance of ex-Soviet states, to quell the protests. The lower house of parliament voted him as the Prime Minister.

questions.question: ‘Daniel Ortega’ sworn in as which country’s President, for his fourth consecutive term?
questions.explanation: Daniel Ortega was sworn in as the President of the Central American country ‘Nicaragua’ for his fourth consecutive term. The United States and European Union imposed sanctions on several persons in his government after the elections. Ortega’s government has been in power since 2007, after his first stint in power ended in 1990.

questions.question: Orang National Park is located in which state/UT?
questions.explanation: Orang National Park is located in the state of Assam at the north bank of the river Brahmaputra. It was previously called as the ‘Rajiv Gandhi Orang National Park’. The Government has recently issued notification to make Orang National Park more than thrice its existing size. The Assam government had issued a notification for adding 200.32 sq. km to the 78.82 sq. Km. Park. Gharials (Gavialis gangeticus) may be introduced in the area to be added to Orang.

questions.question: Which state/UT played host to the ‘25th National Youth Festival’ in 2022?
questions.explanation: Prime Minister Narendra Modi inaugurated the 25th National Youth Festival in Puducherry via video conference. The Prime Minister also inaugurated a technology centre of the MSME Ministry and Perunthalaivar Kamarajar Manimandapam, an auditorium with an open-air theatre in Puducherry, to be used for educational purposes.

questions.question: S Somanath is appointed as the Chairman of which organization?
questions.explanation: Senior Scientist S Somanath, who is presently the Director of the Vikram Sarabhai Space Centre (VSSC), Thiruvananthapuram is appointed as the Chairman of Indian Space Research Organization (ISRO). He would succeed K Sivan as the ISRO chairman, and would be the 4th person from Kerala to occupy ISRO’s top most position.
